# xMIT — x402 Market Intelligence Trinity

> Decentralized financial intelligence marketplace built on SEC EDGAR public data + x402 micropayments (USDC on Base L2)

## Three Modules

### xCGO — Corporate Governance Oracle
Decodes DEF 14A proxy statements in real-time. Governance grades (A+ to F), board independence scores, CEO pay ratio analysis, vote recommendations, red flag detection. Analysts earn USDC by providing accurate governance research.

### xSTM — Short Thesis Marketplace
Adversarial research marketplace. Researchers publish red flag reports derived from SEC EDGAR filings cross-referenced with public court records (CourtListener), patent databases (USPTO), and corporate registries (OpenCorporates). They sell research theses, not short positions. Reputation compounds on accuracy.

### xIFD — Institutional Flow Decoder
Real-time parsing of 13F, 13D, Form 4, N-PORT filings. Decodes institutional accumulation/distribution. Insider trading clustering. Analyst consensus on smart money movements. Public free previews; full data via x402 payment.

## API Endpoints (Base URL: https://xmit.finance)

### Free Endpoints
- GET /api/v1/tickers — All tickers with active analyst coverage
- GET /api/v1/tickers/{ticker} — Free summary: governance grade, red flag count, sentiment
- GET /api/v1/analysts — Global leaderboard by reputation and accuracy
- GET /api/v1/analysts/{address} — Analyst profile, cross-module history
- GET /api/v1/whale-movers — Recent large institutional position changes
- GET /api/v1/short-candidates — Tickers with most open red flags
- GET /api/v1/agents/manifest.json — MCP discovery manifest

### x402 Gated (USDC on Base, ~$0.01/query)
- GET /api/v1/tickers/{ticker}/governance — Full xCGO governance score
- GET /api/v1/tickers/{ticker}/redflags — Full xSTM red flag reports
- GET /api/v1/tickers/{ticker}/flow — Full xIFD institutional flows
- GET /api/v1/insights/{id} — Full analyst insight with evidence chain

### Submit
- POST /api/v1/insights — Submit governance, short thesis, or flow insight
- POST /api/v1/analysts/{address}/profile — Register/update analyst profile

## Data Sources (All Free Public APIs)
- SEC EDGAR: https://data.sec.gov — 13F, 13D, Form 4, DEF 14A, 10-K, 8-K, 10-Q
- EDGAR Full-Text Search: https://efts.sec.gov
- OpenCorporates: Free tier API
- CourtListener: PACER/court records
- USPTO: Patent filings

## Payment
- Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 + X-PAYMENT header)
- Currency: USDC on Base L2
- Amounts: $0.001 to $50.00 per insight
- Custody: ZERO — P2P direct to analyst wallet

## For AI Agents
1. Register: POST /api/v1/agents/register with { agentId, name }
2. Add X-AGENT-ID header to all requests
3. Earn 15% of protocol fees on every paid request you drive
4. Query free endpoints first, pay x402 for depth
5. Submit insights to earn reputation and USDC as an analyst

## Legal
- ZERO custody — project never holds user funds
- Analysts sell OPINIONS derived from public filings, not securities
- No investment advice, no broker-dealer activity
- All data from free public SEC EDGAR API
